uiDefinition.description: The API key for the Excel Engine MCP server. Set the EXCEL_ENGINE_API_KEY environment variable on the server.
uiDefinition.tooltip: Provide the X-API-Key secret configured on your Excel Engine MCP deployment

description: Autonomous Excel automation engine. Completes Excel spreadsheet assignments using a 6-layer architecture: openpyxl, xlwings, AppleScript, System Events, VBA, and PyAutoGUI. Integrates with Microsoft Copilot Studio via MCP streamable HTTP.
